phase_name: Test fixture fixes + GitHub Actions bump

completed_tasks.name: Fix test_settings_api.py + test_custom_pricing.py wrong client fixture
completed_tasks.detail: Added cloud_client fixture (AsyncClient + FastAPI app tuple), switched to app.dependency_overrides for verify_token, added await to all require_role() calls in settings_api.py, fixed _make_db_mock() for transaction context manager, added get_encryption_manager mock. 22/22 tests passing.

remaining_tasks.name: Bump actions/checkout to v5 (Node 20 deprecation, forced June 2 2026)
remaining_tasks.detail: .github/workflows/publish.yml uses actions/checkout@v4 (Node 20). Node 20 deprecated in GH Actions, forced to Node 24 on June 2 2026. Change to actions/checkout@v5. actions/setup-python@v5 may already be Node 24 — verify before changing.

decisions.decision: Use app.dependency_overrides instead of patch() for FastAPI Depends
decisions.rationale: FastAPI captures a direct reference to the dependency function at route registration time. Module-level patches are ignored. dependency_overrides is the only correct mechanism.

decisions.decision: Use MagicMock (not AsyncMock) for transaction() in db mocks
decisions.rationale: AsyncMock child attributes auto-detected as async return coroutines when called, not context managers. MagicMock with async __aenter__/__aexit__ is the correct pattern for asyncpg.Connection.transaction().

decisions.decision: Added await to all require_role() calls in settings_api.py
decisions.rationale: Was a production bug — missing await meant role checks silently no-oped for all endpoints. Discovered via test failures.

next_action: Bump actions/checkout@v4 to actions/checkout@v5 in .github/workflows/publish.yml — verify actions/setup-python@v5 is already Node 24 compatible, then commit and push. After that, check phase 12/13 completion and resume v1.2 milestone work if needed.
context_notes: PyPI v1.2.0 is live (commit 9742669). Main is clean. The test fixes were the last deferred task from the v1.2 release session. Phase 12 (Cloud Alert Engine) has 3 plans all with summaries — may be complete; verify before planning phase 13. The only GitHub Actions file is publish.yml.
